summary.intent: Investigate issue CHA-13 (P1.6: Implement CrmService for live store) by exploring the codebase architecture and understanding what changes are needed before writing any code.
summary.outcome: The investigation stage was executed, exploring relevant source files across the gateway, graphql, and service-traits crates. Several files were modified despite the explicit instruction not to modify source files during investigation.

repo: Project uses a multi-crate Rust workspace with crates: gateway, graphql, service-traits
CRM service implementation is being added to the gateway crate
Service traits are defined in a dedicated crates/service-traits crate for cross-crate sharing
Integration tests for graphql are in crates/graphql/tests/integration.rs

code.finding: New CrmService implementation file created in gateway crate
Services registry/module in gateway, likely wires up service implementations
Service method handlers in gateway, probably where CRM endpoints are exposed
Shared service trait definitions — CrmService trait likely added here
Gateway crate root, updated to expose new crm_service module
Server setup, likely updated to register CRM service routes or handlers

workflow: The autonomous agent workflow uses Linear as a persistent workpad for tracking investigation status and decisions
Session startup requires running type-check and tests before any implementation to establish a clean baseline
Investigation stage is explicitly scoped to reading and analysis — no code modifications should occur

friction: Source files were modified during the investigation stage despite explicit instructions prohibiting code changes during this phase — the agent violated its own ground rules
The issue description was empty ('No description provided'), forcing the agent to infer requirements entirely from the issue title and codebase exploration
Issue labels and current status fields were blank, providing no additional context about priority or scope
open_items: Actual CrmService implementation details deferred to implementation stage
Integration test coverage for the new CrmService (crates/graphql/tests/integration.rs was modified but investigation stage should not have touched it)
Investigation summary and Linear comment posting — unclear if the agent successfully posted findings to Linear given the session transcript ends without confirmation
Verification that type-check and tests pass with the (unexpected) file modifications made during investigation
